decisions.briefing: Markets pulled back today with NASDAQ -1.4% and S&P 500 -0.6%, a risk-off session with no new candidates to consider. Holding all 6 existing positions unchanged and keeping cash on the sidelines rather than forcing a buy into weakness.

market_education.summary_en: Broad indices fell today, led by a sharper NASDAQ decline of -1.4% versus -0.6% for the S&P 500, indicating growth and tech names underperformed more defensive sectors. Risk-off days like this typically reflect investors rotating out of higher-beta assets amid uncertainty. No stock-specific headlines are available today to explain the individual moves.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大市普遍下跌，納斯達克指數跌幅較大，錄得-1.4%，標普500則跌-0.6%，反映增長及科技股表現遜於防守性板塊。此類避險日子通常顯示投資者在不確定因素下，將資金由高波動性資產轉移。今日暫無個股相關頭條新聞可解釋個別股份走勢。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-off' day is when investors pull back from higher-risk assets like growth and tech stocks and move toward safer holdings, often due to economic uncertainty or negative sentiment. On these days, it's usually better to hold steady and avoid chasing new positions rather than reacting emotionally to the dip.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「避險」日子是指投資者因經濟不確定或負面情緒，而減持增長股、科技股等高風險資產，轉向較安全的投資。在這類日子，通常較好的做法是持穩不動，避免因股價下跌而情緒化地追買新股份。
